asset.title: Research Enrichment
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview clearly demonstrates the research enrichment feature, showing the transition from pending states to fully enriched company profiles with corresponding trace logs and agent chat updates.

featureClarity.evidence: The 'Research' tab clearly displays company names, pending statuses, and the enrichment action button.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full sequence: pending records, triggering enrichment, and the populated results with updated logs.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with structured panels, though the layout is highly dense with text.

consistency.evidence: Integrates the core NodeRoom elements: public chat, research spreadsheet, agent notes, and the execution trace.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and log outputs rather than a mock-up.

legibility.evidence: Most text is legible, though small font sizes in the trace log and chat require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for automated data enrichment workflows in sales operations and financial research.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents system latency and step-by-step state updates in the trace panel.

observedEvidence: Research tab with pending company entries
Agent chat notification of completed research

defects.observed: The Room trace log at the bottom right scrolls rapidly, making some entries difficult to read.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the display duration of the final state to allow comfortable reading of the logs.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's agent enrich company profiles with structured data, sources, and real-time trace logging.
